title: scanner-trace-go-test-suite
description: Phase 4: Build the Go test suite (scanner_trace_test.go ~200 lines) that replays recorded C scanner traces against Go scanner implementations. Includes: TraceEntry struct for JSONL deserialization, traceLexer mock (~100 lines) implementing the Advance/MarkEnd/Lookahead/ResultSymbol interface fed from corpus input bytes, TestScannerTraces function that iterates all 11 languages, deserializes scanner state before each call, calls Scan with recorded valid_symbols, and compares matched/result_symbol/advances/post-state. Each trace entry is independently verifiable via state deserialization. See docs/scanner-trace-testing-plan.md Phase 4.
